query:
INSERT INTO blender_installation_location
            (
            id,
            is_default,
            full_control,
            modify,
            read_and_execute,
            list_folder_contents,
            read,
            write,
            special_permissions,
            directory_path,
            created_by,
            created,
            modified
            ) VALUES ( 
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?
            ) ON CONFLICT(directory_path) DO NOTHING
